rationale: Candidate X produced no answer at all (API error, rc=1), so it cannot be credited on any dimension. Candidate Y correctly reaches the same disposition as the ground truth (duplicate of #4808, tied to the #4809 triage issue) while grounding the claim in specific call sites, file paths, and line numbers, and goes further by flagging two legitimate open risks (whether #4808's fix actually landed on main, and a regression-test coverage gap) that make it more useful to a maintainer than a bare duplicate-closure comment.
